rationale: The pair is topically related (the 2008 paper studies promotion-window framing and explicitly situates itself against prior work on objective promotion characteristics, while the 2002 paper analyzes promotion effects on incidence/choice/quantity over time). But the matched evidence is only a DOI entry with no citation-context text, and the notes do not explicitly show the 2008 studies using the 2002 paper’s method or core results. Given this sparse linkage, it cannot be safely dropped, but clear substantive use is not yet established.
